T0165.title: Database Deduping
T0165.definition: In underground data trading, the practice of comparing newly provided data against an existing illicit personal information database to filter out duplicates or historical records, ensuring freshness.
T0165.description: In underground data trading, the practice of comparing newly provided data against an existing illicit personal information database to filter out duplicates or historical records, ensuring freshness.
T0165.usageExample: "Direct data intake, mixed gender, over 25, 15 per record, deduped against the library. Data handover at midnight, payment by 8 PM next day. Capable operators, look here."
